data.content: Integrated HistoryDebugPanel into AgentHistoryView. Added Debug toggle button in conversation log header (visible when sessions loaded), debugPanelOpen state with auto-close on beat change, and side-by-side grid layout for conversation log + debug panel. Tests added in agent-history-view-debug-integration.test.ts (6 tests). All quality gates pass: lint, typecheck, 2035 tests, build.
